title: UiPath's Agentic Automation Engine Reignites Its Growth Trajectory
text: Nasdaq analysis examines how UiPath's agentic automation capabilities are reigniting growth trajectory. Strategic shift from legacy RPA to agentic AI platform represents transformational change in company's market positioning. Recent earnings results show early evidence of growth acceleration driven by AI adoption: ARR growth rates improving, larger customer spending 3x more with AI products, 90% of >$1M ARR customers using AI capabilities. Partnership ecosystem: UiPath collaborations with Microsoft Azure AI Foundry, OpenAI, Google, NVIDIA, and Snowflake strengthen platform capabilities and expand addressable market. Product innovation: Agentic automation platform combined with traditional RPA capabilities and orchestration creates differentiated offering. Gartner Magic Quadrant recognition as Leader for seventh consecutive year validates market positioning. Financial metrics supporting momentum: Full-year GAAP profitability achieved in FY2026, non-GAAP operating margins expanding toward 30% target, strong cash generation with >$180M quarterly operating cash flow. Market opportunity: Agentic AI represents multi-year growth opportunity as enterprises build next generation of automation-driven business processes. Key catalyst: Successful translation of AI adoption into revenue acceleration and operating leverage improvement.
